Pricing

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Start free. Scale as your agent network grows. No hidden fees, no credit card required for the free tier.

Free

For individual developers and small projects getting started with agent trust.

$0/month
100 checks/month
  • 100 trust checks/month
  • Basic trust scoring (0–100)
  • Public agent profiles
  • Community support
  • REST API access
Most Popular

Pro

For teams and platforms integrating trust verification at scale.

$29/month
10,000 checks/month
  • 10,000 trust checks/month
  • Full category breakdown
  • Attestation chain analysis
  • Takeover detection alerts
  • Priority API rate limits
  • Webhook notifications
  • Email support

Enterprise

For platforms requiring unlimited checks, SLAs, and dedicated infrastructure.

Custom
Unlimited checks/month
  • Unlimited trust checks
  • Dedicated infrastructure
  • Custom scoring modules
  • On-premise deployment option
  • SSO & team management
  • SLA guarantee (99.9%)
  • Dedicated support engineer
  • Custom integrations

All plans include REST API access, Python SDK, and CLI tools. Questions? Contact us.

© 2025 isnad. Built with cryptography, not trust.
